title: procedure-annotator/context
description: JEAB Procedure category, context sub-annotator. Declares the environmental context in which a phase or schedule operates. Essential for renewal (ABA/ABC/AAB) designs and contextual control studies.

context.description: Environmental context identifier. Labels the physical or stimulus context (e.g., operant chamber configuration, olfactory/visual/tactile cues) in which the procedure is conducted. Used in renewal paradigms (Bouton, 2002; Bouton & Todd, 2014) and context-dependent learning studies.
context.reference: Bouton, M. E. (2002). Context, ambiguity, and unlearning: Sources of relapse after behavioral extinction. Biological Psychiatry, 52(10), 976-986. https://doi.org/10.1016/S0006-3223(02)01546-9
